center.name: Masauji Hachisuka
center.summary: Masauji Hachisuka是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括赤颈鹤、绿脸鹦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green-faced parrotfinch (Erythrura viridifacies) is a rare species of estrildid finch found in northern Philippines, on Luzon, Mindoro, Panay, Negros and Cebu islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: luzonica Hachisuka, 1941(Philippine sarus crane – extinct) | synonyms = *Ardea antigone *Grus antigone *Grus collaris Boddaert, 1783 | range_map = SarusMap.svg | range_map_caption = }} The sarus crane (Antigone antigone) is a large nonmigratory crane found in parts of the Indian subcontinent, Southeast Asia, and northern Australia
